name: English Trifle
recipeIngredient: 1 Angel Food Cake, fresh baked or purchased, cut into medium pieces
1 package Sugar Free Raspberry Jello (6-serving size)
3 Fresh mint leaves or similar garnish
recipeInstructions:
1. Break angel cake into medium pieces and spread each with a small amount of Raspberry Jam.
2. Arrange the cakes in a straight-sided glass bowl.
3. Pour over the sherry and weigh down lightly with a saucer. Cover with plastic wrap and set aside for several hours, allowing the sherry to be absorbed.
4. Mix Jello according to directions (do not use ice) and pour over the cake and sherry in the bowl.
5. Cover and place in refrigerator for several hours or overnight until jello is set.
6. Before serving, prepare Vanilla Pudding mix and pour over the top of the jello. Use a knife to slide down the sides of the bowl, allowing some pudding to run along the sides.
7. Cover and chill again.
8. Garnish with cherries and mint or use candied holiday fruits to decorate the top of the bowl.
9. When serving, gently slide a spoon to the bottom of the bowl for each serving to ensure layers of color and flavor, particularly the sherry.
If using regular jam, jello, and pudding mix, this recipe remains suitable for those not watching sugar content or calories. The dish looks best in a straight-sided glass bowl and has been a family favorite during Christmas since childhood.
